evidence_digest.default_summary: Treat Spikes as a route subgame. Ask whether the line sets, retains, removes, punishes Spin, or converts the entry map. Hazard progress is not real if the opponent can remove it without giving up a route-relevant cost. Hazard job orderin...
evidence_digest.title: Hazard Loop Spin Window
evidence_digest.use_when: Spikes, Rapid Spin, spinblocking, or post-support handoff determines
evidence_digest.worst_branch: You call setting Spikes progress, give the opponent a free spinner sequence, and lose both hazard pressure and tempo.
